generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to have strong domestic security measures. Recent events show that our current laws are outdated and can't keep up with modern threats. Expanding security powers isn't about restricting freedoms - it's about protecting them. Look at how other countries handle similar situations. They've struck the right balance between safety and civil liberties, and we can too. It's our responsibility to ensure our agencies have the tools they need to keep us safe. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
